verses.arabicText: فَجَعَلَهُمْ جُذَٰذًا إِلَّا كَبِيرًۭا لَّهُمْ لَعَلَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِ يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.translationText: So he made them into fragments, except a large one among them, that they might return to it [and question].

verses.arabicText: قَالُوا۟ مَن فَعَلَ هَٰذَا بِـَٔالِهَتِنَآ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.translationText: They said, "Who has done this to our gods? Indeed, he is of the wrongdoers."

verses.arabicText: قَالُوا۟ سَمِعْنَا فَتًۭى يَذْكُرُهُمْ يُقَالُ لَهُۥٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمُ
verses.translationText: They said, "We heard a young man mention them who is called Abraham."

verses.arabicText: قَالُوا۟ فَأْتُوا۟ بِهِۦ عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِ ٱلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَشْهَدُونَ
verses.translationText: They said, "Then bring him before the eyes of the people that they may testify."

verses.arabicText: قَالُوٓا۟ ءَأَنتَ فَعَلْتَ هَٰذَا بِـَٔالِهَتِنَا يَٰٓإِبْرَٰهِيمُ
verses.translationText: They said, "Have you done this to our gods, O Abraham?"

verses.arabicText: قَالَ بَلْ فَعَلَهُۥ كَبِيرُهُمْ هَٰذَا فَسْـَٔلُوهُمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ يَنطِقُونَ
verses.translationText: He said, "Rather, this - the largest of them - did it, so ask them, if they should [be able to] speak."

verses.arabicText: فَرَجَعُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّكُمْ أَنتُمُ ٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ
verses.translationText: So they returned to [blaming] themselves and said [to each other], "Indeed, you are the wrongdoers."

verses.arabicText: ثُمَّ نُكِسُوا۟ عَلَىٰ رُءُوسِهِمْ لَقَدْ عَلِمْتَ مَا هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ يَنطِقُونَ
verses.translationText: Then they reversed themselves, [saying], "You have already known that these do not speak!"

verses.arabicText: قَالَ أَفَتَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا يَنفَعُكُمْ شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا يَضُرُّكُمْ
verses.translationText: He said, "Then do you worship instead of Allah that which does not benefit you at all or harm you?

verses.arabicText: أُفٍّۢ لَّكُمْ وَلِمَا تَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.translationText: Uff to you and to what you worship instead of Allah. Then will you not use reason?"

verses.arabicText: قَالُوا۟ حَرِّقُوهُ وَٱنصُرُوٓا۟ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ فَٰعِلِينَ
verses.translationText: They said, "Burn him and support your gods - if you are to act."

verses.arabicText: قُلْنَا يَٰنَارُ كُونِى بَرْدًۭا وَسَلَٰمًا عَلَىٰٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ
verses.translationText: Allah said, "O fire, be coolness and safety upon Abraham."
And they intended for him harm, but We made them the greatest losers.

verses.arabicText: وَنَجَّيْنَٰهُ وَلُوطًا إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلَّتِى بَٰرَكْنَا فِيهَا لِلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translationText: And We delivered him and Lot to the land which We had blessed for the worlds.

verses.arabicText: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ إِسْحَٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ نَافِلَةًۭ ۖ وَكُلًّۭا جَعَلْنَا صَٰلِحِينَ
verses.translationText: And We gave him Isaac and Jacob in addition, and all [of them] We made righteous.
